rows.label: qev035401_MSG0001
rows.name:
You're a BLADE too, aren't you? Then you'd
better be careful around Gus's team.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0002
rows.name:
Our team lost the lives of
many comrades because we got
tangled up with those guys...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_JNK0010
rows.name: Interest

rows.label: qev035401_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask for details about Gus's
team's bad reputation.

rows.label: qev035401_JNK0020
rows.name: Doubt

rows.label: qev035401_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask about the team Quincy belongs to.

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0003
rows.name:
It happened when we were
conducting a field investigation
to collect research samples...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0004
rows.name:
A team led by a man named Gus came relying
on us, saying they were attacked by native
creatures and lost many comrades.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0005
rows.name:
Feeling pity for them, we decided to
help with their extermination mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0006
rows.name:
And just as the mission was
completed... They suddenly pushed
us off the bottom of a cliff...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0007
rows.name:
It was all a trap by those bastards to
steal the credit for our achievements...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0008
rows.name:
Even though we still have two requests
we must complete, my team members
all died leaving me behind...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0009
rows.name: I am filled with such regret...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0010
rows.name:
I'm the leader of a small team
gathered from acquaintances during
our Coalition forces days.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0011
rows.name:
...No, since I'm the only one left, I
suppose I should say I "was" the leader?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0012
rows.name:
My comrades were all deceived and killed
by a team led by a man named Gus.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0013
rows.name:
Everyone was good-natured to the core and
completely trusted them as fellow BLADEs...
And those bastards took advantage of that...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0014
rows.name:
Even though we still have two
requests we must complete...
I am filled with regret...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0015
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0016
rows.name:
Um... I am fully aware that this is
an incredibly brazen request, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0017
rows.name:
Could you temporarily join my Quincy Team
and fulfill our missions in our stead?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0018
rows.name: It might be a little sentimental, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0019
rows.name:
I want to offer our team's final jobs as a
tribute to my comrades, who took pride in their
duties as BLADEs more than anything else.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0020
rows.name:
You are truly a BLADE among
BLADEs! Ah... I am so happy![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0021
rows.name:
Through the numerous adversities since leaving
Earth... I cannot help but feel the deep bonds
that have been cultivated among us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirmation

rows.label: qev035401_SEL0031
rows.name:
Empathize with Quincy and speak
about the preciousness of bonds.

rows.label: qev035401_JNK0040
rows.name: Denial

rows.label: qev035401_SEL0041
rows.name:
Push him away, saying you
just want the reward.

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0022
rows.name:
This is exactly the bond of us BLADEs!
The very existence of foolish people like
Gus's team is some kind of mistake![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0023
rows.name:
Oh dear... I feel like I'm going
to cry from sheer emotion...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0024
rows.name:
...First, I'd like to ask you for an extermination
mission... for a Linker Scirpo at Red Rust Lake
in Nightglow Forest, you noble soul![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0025
rows.name:
It's quite a ferocious one,
so please be careful.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0026
rows.name:
Are you the type of person who can
only act out of self-interest, just
like those scoundrels in Gus's team!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0027
rows.name:
That's wrong... BLADEs should cast aside
their selfish desires and live purely
for the happiness of the people...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0028
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0029
rows.name:
...No... I'm sorry. Even though
I'm the one asking a favor, I
said such selfish things...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0030
rows.name:
Besides, you are different from them. I
can tell just by looking into your eyes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0031
rows.name:
So, first, please take on the extermination
of a Linker Scirpo located at Red Rust
Lake in Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0032
rows.name:
It's quite a ferocious one,
so please be careful.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0033
rows.name:
The first mission is the extermination
of a Linker Scirpo located at Red
Rust Lake in Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0034
rows.name:
It seems to be quite a formidable
foe, so please be careful.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0035
rows.name:
We are BLADEs, the last hope of Earthlings~♪
With the power of bonds and guts, we'll
slice through the darkness of space~♪[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0036
rows.name: ...Ah! You had already returned?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0037
rows.name:
I'm sorry, I was letting my deceased
comrades hear our team's song. How
is the mission progressing?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_JNK0050
rows.name: Report

rows.label: qev035401_SEL0051
rows.name:
Report that the extermination is
complete and that Gus's team appeared.

rows.label: qev035401_JNK0060
rows.name: Urge

rows.label: qev035401_SEL0061
rows.name: Urge him to continue the song.

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0038
rows.name:
...Ahem. Then allow me to sing.
Our Quincy Team's soul song...
BLADE Lullaby ~Bonds~ 1st Verse...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0039
rows.name:
Heading toward a haven at the far
ends of the universe~♪ Got it, there
are no blind spots before us~♪[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0040
rows.name:
When we think of our hometown, sometimes
we shed tears~♪ But it's alright, we
are not alone~♪ We are not alone~♪[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0041
rows.name:
We are BLADEs, the last hope of
Earthlings~♪ Hand in hand, we'll
slice through the darkness of space~♪[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0042
rows.name:
...Phew, I got carried away and sang
all the way to the 13th verse.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0043
rows.name:
How was it? Were you able to feel
the power of our team's bonds?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0044
rows.name:
Yes... Now returning to the topic
at hand, how did the mission go?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0045
rows.name:
...What!? The guys from
Gus's team showed up![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0046
rows.name:
Perhaps they saw me asking you for
this request from somewhere...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0047
rows.name:
I'm sorry, it's possible those bastards
might interfere again, but... Could you
accept the other mission as well?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_JNK0070
rows.name: Affirmation

rows.label: qev035401_SEL0071
rows.name: Nod and say it's obvious.

rows.label: qev035401_JNK0080
rows.name: Negotiation

rows.label: qev035401_SEL0081
rows.name:
Say you'll think about it
if he adds to the reward.

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0048
rows.name:
Aah! My sibling bound by the bonds of
our souls! You are truly a BLADE among
BLADEs! Come, let us sing together![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0049
rows.name:
...Ah? You've had enough of the
song? I see. Then I will explain
the details of the request...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0050
rows.name:
There's a precious gem called the Crimson Tear
resting in Devil's Colony in the Valley of
Oblivion, and I'd like you to recover it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0051
rows.name:
Money... is it? Since when did BLADEs
turn into something like that...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0052
rows.name:
...It's fine. As long as you properly acquire
the requested item... the Crimson Tear, I
will give you the entire reward for it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0053
rows.name:
The Crimson Tear rests in the
deepest part of Devil's Colony in
the Valley of Oblivion. However...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0054
rows.name:
I've also heard rumors that terrifying native creatures
have taken up residence in that cave. Please make
sure you are well prepared before heading there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0055
rows.name:
This is the Quincy Team's final request.
Please retrieve the Crimson Tear located in
Devil's Colony in the Valley of Oblivion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0056
rows.name:
You've returned. How was it? Were you
able to obtain the Crimson Tear?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0057
rows.name:
This is exactly the Crimson
Tear! What a gemstone, radiating
such a beautiful brilliance.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0058
rows.name:
...And, what did you say? The guys
from Gus's team provoked native
creatures and ended up getting killed...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0059
rows.name:
That is... karmic retribution, or perhaps
I should say... It makes you feel a
little pity for them, doesn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_JNK0090
rows.name: Affirmation

rows.label: qev035401_SEL0091
rows.name: Sympathize with how Gus died.

rows.label: qev035401_JNK0100
rows.name: Denial

rows.label: qev035401_SEL0101
rows.name:
Declare that you don't
feel a shred of sympathy.

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0060
rows.name:
If they were BLADEs too, they must have
had at least a little desire to protect
the people living in this NLA...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0061
rows.name:
The harsh environment of Planet Mira
must have twisted their feelings...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0062
rows.name:
Hmm... I suppose that's one way to
look at it. Perhaps it even cleared
the hearts of my murdered comrades.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0063
rows.name:
This is the reward for the
two missions I requested of
you. Please, take all of it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0064
rows.name:
Thank you very much... With this, my
comrades can rest in peace until the
day we reach the Central Life...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0065
rows.name:
You've returned. So, how was it? Were
you able to obtain the Crimson Tear?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0066
rows.name:
...Eh!? You fell right into Gus's
trap and it was taken from you...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0067
rows.name:
Why did you save his life? He's an atrocious
villain who took the lives of our comrades
and even attacked you, isn't he?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_JNK0110
rows.name: Hope

rows.label: qev035401_SEL0111
rows.name:
Say that you wanted to believe
in them to the end because
they were fellow BLADEs.

rows.label: qev035401_JNK0120
rows.name: Mission

rows.label: qev035401_SEL0121
rows.name:
Say that you couldn't abandon
someone whose life was in danger.

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0068
rows.name:
Even without fearing being
betrayed... is it? You truly are...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0069
rows.name:
Your body moved on its own...
is it? You truly are...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0070
rows.name:
You're a soft-hearted person who
easily matches the members of our
Quincy Team, aren't you...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0071
rows.name:
I'm very sorry, but I can only
give you the reward for the
extermination mission...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0072
rows.name:
However, looking at you, I feel like the way my
comrades lived, dying while believing in those
guys until the very end, was the right path...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035401_MSG0073
rows.name: ...Thank you, truly.[ST:wait ]
